title: Executive – Sales & Marketing
description:
We are seeking a car-loving, automotive-passionate Executive to join our growing team. This role is ideal for individuals who genuinely love cars, enjoy working in an automotive environment, and aspire to build a long-term career in the automotive and vehicle services industry.

If you enjoy discussing cars, creating engaging automotive content, interacting with customers, and being involved in real workshop operations, this role is well-suited for you.

The ideal candidate is hands-on, customer-focused and capable of balancing sales and content creation in a fast-paced environment.
-------------------------------------------------------------

Key Responsibilities

1. Online & Direct Sales

  • Drive online and direct sales through social media, messaging platforms, and walk-in enquiries
  • Prepare sales quotations, billing, and invoices accurately
  • Track and report sales performance using Xero and internal systems

2. Vehicle Insurance Sales Support

  • Support vehicle insurance inquires
  • Ensure full compliance with insurer SOPs and documentation requirements
  • Coordinate submissions and follow up on insurance cases

3. Marketing Content Creation

  • Plan, shoot, and publish various forms of marketing videos and collaterals
  • Maintain consistent posting schedules across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Facebook Reels
  • Ensure content aligns with company branding and sales objectives

4. Accident Reporting & Insurance Claim Assistance (ARC)

  • Assist customers with accident reporting and claim submissions
  • Guide customers clearly and professionally through ARC procedures
  • Ensure compliance with insurer and ARC SOPs

5. Customer Engagement & Service

  • Respond to customer enquiries promptly via WhatsApp, phone, and email
  • Maintain high service standards to support repeat and referral business
  • Handle basic complaints professionally and escalate when required

6. Administrative & Operational Excellence

  • Maintain accurate records, reports, and documentation
  • Ensure SOP and policy compliance
  • Support cross-team coordination and task execution

Any other duties as assigned.

Requirements

  • This is an entry-level position those with a passion is the automotive industry are welcome to apply.
  • Strong written & communication skills
  • Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multitask
  • Familiarity with social media platforms is a must
  • Experience with insurance, ARC, automotive, or service industry is an advantage
  • Willing to learn and take on responsibility


What We Offer:

  • Competitive Basic Salary
  • Monthly Allowance
  • Performance-Based Incentives & Commission
  • Complimentary Lunch Provided
  • Flexible work days and timings

postedCompany.description:
About KWS Engineering & Services

At KWS Engineering & Services, we specialize in providing innovative and reliable automotive solutions tailored to meet industry demands. Our expertise includes the manufacturing and repair of automotive vehicle components, with a strong focus on Battery-Operated Carts (BOC), Golf Carts, and customized automotive parts and accessories.

We also excel in engine and gearbox overhauls, ensuring peak performance and longevity for your vehicles. Additionally, we offer professional refurbishment of alternators and starters and serve as a trusted wholesale supplier of automotive components. With a commitment to quality and precision, KWS Engineering & Services is your one-stop solution for all automotive engineering needs.
postedCompany.name: KWS ENGINEERING & SERVICES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
